Why You Show Up

Test. Train. Get Seen.

A real combine experience built to measure your game, sharpen your skills, and put you in front of the people who matter.

01

Combine Testing

Get your verified numbers across the events that college coaches actually look for.

  • 40-Yard Dash
  • Pro Agility
  • Broad Jump
  • Vertical Jump
02

Skills Training

Position-specific coaching and drills designed to level up your technique on the spot.

  • Learn
  • Improve
  • Get Better
03

Real Exposure

Compete in front of the eyes that open doors and put your name on the map.

  • College Coaches
  • Media Coverage
  • Top Competition
Lock Your Spot

Athlete Registration

Takes about two minutes. Free for every PfISD student-athlete — fill it out and you're in.

★ Free of Charge ★

Claim Your Spot

One form. One field. One district — all in.

1

Athlete Profile

Please enter your full name.
Please choose your school.
Please select your grad year.
Please select your position.
Please enter your height.
Please enter a valid weight.
2

Academics

On a standard scale (0.00 – 5.00). Please enter a valid GPA.
3

Contact Info

Please enter a valid email.
Please enter a valid phone number.
4

Recruiting Profile

Optional — paste your full Hudl profile or highlight URL.
Optional.
Optional.

Your spot for the PfISD Football Combine & Skills Camp is locked in. We'll see you Saturday, July 18 at The Pfield. Come ready to compete.
